name: Paystack
description: Paystack helps businesses in Africa get paid by anyone, anywhere in the world. Acquired by Stripe in 2020 for over $200 million.

name: Flutterwave
description: Flutterwave provides payment infrastructure for global merchants and payment service providers across Africa and beyond.

name: Andela
description: Andela connects companies with vetted remote software engineers across Africa, bridging the global tech talent gap.

name: Opay
description: OPay is a mobile money platform offering payments, transfers, savings, and lending services across Nigeria.

name: Moniepoint
description: Moniepoint provides digital financial services for businesses, including payments, banking, credit, and business management tools.

name: Kuda Bank
description: Kuda is a digital-only bank offering free transfers, savings, budgeting tools, and overdrafts with no monthly fees.

name: uLesson
description: uLesson delivers curriculum-relevant educational content to African students via smartphones, working even with limited internet.

name: 54gene
description: 54gene is a genomics research company building Africa's largest biobank to accelerate drug discovery and diagnostics.

name: LifeBank
description: LifeBank is a medical distribution company that uses data and technology to find and deliver lifesaving medical products across Africa.

name: Kobo360
description: Kobo360 is a digital logistics platform connecting cargo owners with truck owners to streamline freight movement across Africa.

name: MAX.ng
description: MAX is a mobility and logistics startup using motorcycles and electric vehicles to move people and goods efficiently across African cities.

name: Farmcrowdy
description: Farmcrowdy is a digital agriculture platform that connects smallholder farmers with sponsors and markets to boost food production.

name: ThriveAgric
description: ThriveAgric provides smallholder farmers with access to finance, farm inputs, and guaranteed markets through a tech-enabled platform.

name: Paga
description: Paga is a mobile payment platform that enables people to send money, pay bills, and perform transactions via mobile and agent networks.

name: Releaf
description: Releaf builds technology and infrastructure to make African crop processing more efficient, starting with palm oil in Nigeria.

name: Helium Health
description: Helium Health provides an electronic medical records and hospital management platform for healthcare providers across Africa.

name: CowryWise
description: CowryWise is a savings and investment platform that helps Nigerians build wealth through automated savings plans and mutual funds.

name: Gokada
description: Gokada is a last-mile logistics and delivery platform operating across Lagos, helping businesses fulfill orders quickly and affordably.
